verses.text: 'O give thanks unto the LORD; for he is good,' and let 'the redeemed of the LORD say so,' gathered from every land. The rescued are called to testify. Those who have known God's deliverance should declare it aloud.

'O give thanks unto the LORD; for he is good,' and let 'the redeemed of the LORD say so,' gathered from every land. The rescued are called to testify. Those who have known God's deliverance should declare it aloud.

'O give thanks unto the LORD; for he is good,' and let 'the redeemed of the LORD say so,' gathered from every land. The rescued are called to testify. Those who have known God's deliverance should declare it aloud.

Some wandered lost and hungry in the wilderness, their soul fainting; 'then they cried unto the LORD,' and He delivered them. Distress drove them to prayer. The God who hears the lost leads them to a city of rest.

Some wandered lost and hungry in the wilderness, their soul fainting; 'then they cried unto the LORD,' and He delivered them. Distress drove them to prayer. The God who hears the lost leads them to a city of rest.

Some wandered lost and hungry in the wilderness, their soul fainting; 'then they cried unto the LORD,' and He delivered them. Distress drove them to prayer. The God who hears the lost leads them to a city of rest.
He led them by a straight way to a place to dwell, for 'he satisfieth the longing soul' with goodness. He meets the hungry heart. God fills with good the soul that turns to Him empty.
He led them by a straight way to a place to dwell, for 'he satisfieth the longing soul' with goodness. He meets the hungry heart. God fills with good the soul that turns to Him empty.
He led them by a straight way to a place to dwell, for 'he satisfieth the longing soul' with goodness. He meets the hungry heart. God fills with good the soul that turns to Him empty.

Others sat in darkness, bound in iron for rebelling against God's word, brought low with none to help; 'then they cried unto the LORD.' Captivity humbled them. Affliction often opens the lips that pride kept shut.

Others sat in darkness, bound in iron for rebelling against God's word, brought low with none to help; 'then they cried unto the LORD.' Captivity humbled them. Affliction often opens the lips that pride kept shut.

Others sat in darkness, bound in iron for rebelling against God's word, brought low with none to help; 'then they cried unto the LORD.' Captivity humbled them. Affliction often opens the lips that pride kept shut.

Others sat in darkness, bound in iron for rebelling against God's word, brought low with none to help; 'then they cried unto the LORD.' Captivity humbled them. Affliction often opens the lips that pride kept shut.
He brought them out of darkness, broke their bands, and shattered 'the gates of brass.' No prison holds against Him. The God who hears can free the most hopeless captive.
He brought them out of darkness, broke their bands, and shattered 'the gates of brass.' No prison holds against Him. The God who hears can free the most hopeless captive.
He brought them out of darkness, broke their bands, and shattered 'the gates of brass.' No prison holds against Him. The God who hears can free the most hopeless captive.
Fools afflicted for their sins loathed all food and drew near death; 'then they cry unto the LORD.' Sin sickened them. Suffering is sometimes the bitter medicine that turns the foolish back to God.
Fools afflicted for their sins loathed all food and drew near death; 'then they cry unto the LORD.' Sin sickened them. Suffering is sometimes the bitter medicine that turns the foolish back to God.
Fools afflicted for their sins loathed all food and drew near death; 'then they cry unto the LORD.' Sin sickened them. Suffering is sometimes the bitter medicine that turns the foolish back to God.

'He sent his word, and healed them,' delivering them from destruction; let them give thanks and tell His works with joy. His word is His healing. The same word that wounds the conscience restores the soul.

'He sent his word, and healed them,' delivering them from destruction; let them give thanks and tell His works with joy. His word is His healing. The same word that wounds the conscience restores the soul.

'He sent his word, and healed them,' delivering them from destruction; let them give thanks and tell His works with joy. His word is His healing. The same word that wounds the conscience restores the soul.

Those who sail the seas see His works in the deep; He raises the storm, the waves mount up, and the sailors reel and are at their wits' end. Man's skill fails before the tempest. The roaring sea humbles the proudest mariner.

Those who sail the seas see His works in the deep; He raises the storm, the waves mount up, and the sailors reel and are at their wits' end. Man's skill fails before the tempest. The roaring sea humbles the proudest mariner.

Those who sail the seas see His works in the deep; He raises the storm, the waves mount up, and the sailors reel and are at their wits' end. Man's skill fails before the tempest. The roaring sea humbles the proudest mariner.

'Then they cry unto the LORD,' and He stills the storm to a calm and brings them to their desired haven; let them praise Him in the congregation. He hushes the waves. The God of the storm is also the God of the safe harbour.

'Then they cry unto the LORD,' and He stills the storm to a calm and brings them to their desired haven; let them praise Him in the congregation. He hushes the waves. The God of the storm is also the God of the safe harbour.

'Then they cry unto the LORD,' and He stills the storm to a calm and brings them to their desired haven; let them praise Him in the congregation. He hushes the waves. The God of the storm is also the God of the safe harbour.

He turns rivers to desert and fruitful land to barrenness for wickedness, yet makes the wilderness into pools for His people. He governs land and water. God can wither the proud and refresh the humble at His will.

He turns rivers to desert and fruitful land to barrenness for wickedness, yet makes the wilderness into pools for His people. He governs land and water. God can wither the proud and refresh the humble at His will.

He turns rivers to desert and fruitful land to barrenness for wickedness, yet makes the wilderness into pools for His people. He governs land and water. God can wither the proud and refresh the humble at His will.
There He settles the hungry, who build a city, sow fields, and are blessed and multiplied. He establishes the lowly. The God who scatters also plants and prospers His own.
There He settles the hungry, who build a city, sow fields, and are blessed and multiplied. He establishes the lowly. The God who scatters also plants and prospers His own.
There He settles the hungry, who build a city, sow fields, and are blessed and multiplied. He establishes the lowly. The God who scatters also plants and prospers His own.

When they are brought low by oppression, He pours contempt on princes, but sets the poor on high; 'whoso is wise... shall understand the lovingkindness of the LORD.' His providence reverses fortunes. The wise read in all of life the steadfast mercy of God.
